translation: From the Kanesh colony to the messenger and the messenger the messenger and the messenger The messenger will come to the City
Of the matter of the City that all these men have settled accounts in the City The Kanesh colony must not raise claim against the colony

The representatives say that you have written me about how much silver he has given to the palace or he has given it to the palace or he has given it to the palace or he has given it to you My dear fathers dear fathers dear fathers dear fathers dear fathers dear fathers dear fathers debt
The sons send me word to every single and two of the merchants and the merchants Send me word to the merchants
